name: unykorn-master
description: UnyKorn protocol monorepo — TLD registry, smart contracts, wallet UI

scripts.full-build: node scripts/inventory.mjs && node scripts/build-registry.mjs && node scripts/build-proof-pack.mjs
scripts.lp:check: npm run lp:check:usdc && npm run lp:check:wavax
scripts.lp:check:usdc: cd packages/unyKorn-contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/checkLP.ts --network avalanche
scripts.lp:check:wavax: cd packages/unyKorn-contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/checkLP.ts --network avalanche
